name: Topgolf Swing Suite at Hawthorn Suites Odessa
about: Topgolf Swing Suite at Hawthorn Suites Odessa is an immersive social experience that combines virtual golf simulation with a comfortable lounge and food and beverage service. The venue offers a variety of golf and non-golf games on a massive screen, catering to all skill levels from beginners to experienced golfers. Powered by Full Swing golf simulator technology, the same system used by PGA Tour pros for off-course practice, it provides a one-of-a-kind simulation experience. The facility is available for parties and group events and features a full bar and kitchen serving food items like appetizers, pizza, and burgers.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by industry-leading Full Swing technology used by PGA Tour professionals
Offers a wide variety of games including golf, baseball, and other sports simulations
Comfortable lounge environment with full food and beverage service available
Available for private events and team building activities
Affixed pricing at $60 per hour for a private bay

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with menu items including Jalapeno Birdie, Veggie Pizza, BBQ Bacon Burger, Back Swing 'Philly' Wedge Fries, and Buffalo Chicken Pizza. Food can be ordered online via Grubhub.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used by PGA Tour pros Tiger Woods, Jordan Spieth and Jason Day for off-course practice.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are provided on-site as part of the experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full kitchen and bar that serves food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time varies by the number of players and the game chosen, but typically one bay can accommodate multiple games and players for an hour-long session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Topgolf Swing Suite is fun for all ages and skill levels, making it a great option for families and kids.
